What Sound Does A ___ Make?
What Sound Does A ___ Make?

  • Each new person is a rehook which earns retention

The Mbappe Special
The Mbappe Special

13M
4x
Moment
World Cup YT Shorts
John Nellis
World Cup YT Shorts
  • John Nellis: FF is mid but the concept is so unique it makes up for it. Positions John as very hospitable/likeable. Video is a bit long at 55s. Payoff is mid but the emotion it’s shooting for is feel good
  • BR2: Curiosity gap + celeb appeal + quick cuts in FF earn the view. Pacing, emoji bar keep retention. Smart camera angle of the ball coming towards the viewer. Payoff is mid but the concept creates comment bait
  • Zhong: Curiosity gap + celeb appeal earns the view. Pacing, progress bar keep retention. On-field access → novelty → views. Payoff is mid but it makes you root for Zhong/makes him likeable
  • Speed: Shooting style and editing is low production, makes it feel platform native. Sound quality is great + close ups of Speed make you feel like you’re there. Part of over-performance likely due to the match just being CRAZY

Moment
4th of July IG Sounds
4th of July IG Sounds
  • 4th of July took over US but not Global trending lists
  • Calendar tentpole for main TT and possibly Feastables/Labs
  • Highest-viewed videos were all low-lift, not over-produced. That’s what works on IG/TT
#1 Trending Sound
43M
43x
Format
Interactive Use Of Platform Feature
Amir Zakeri
Interactive Use Of Platform Feature
  • Channels with strong VFX use the speed up feature to gamify the FF and retention
  • Creates an interactive experience for the viewer which enables and enhances the creative concept
  • The prompt in the FF invites the viewer to play a game in a usually mindless scroll, which stops the scroll and earns the view
  • The DDR example is similar in interactivity enhancing a creative
12M
160x
Format
The Car Crash Trick
The Car Crash Trick
  • This creates instant stakes at the highest possible level (death) -> earns the view
  • The quick cuts and angle changes with the same problem (car coming at them) -> earns retention
  • The main takeaway is how important stakes are to stopping the scroll
  • Similar to our Lowe’s Plane format - maybe inspo for branded?
19M
4x
Creators
Games To Play With Friends
Moon Media
Games To Play With Friends
  • Moon Media: popularizing timer trend and stump trend. visual formats that earn retention because viewer needs to see who can get the nail in with the least amount of swings
  • Ivy: phone counter format is trending across TT+IG, it forces the viewer to watch until the end and allows for showing personality
  • Jacopo Aquila: the 2nd most watched creator our TT following watches. tons of games formats to ideate from
Beastify idea
1. Stump trend with the boys but with different disadvantages. Some have a rubber chicken, some are blindfolded, etc.

2. Phone counter format with Thea - Don’t eat the last ___ (whatever they both hate)
